I'm Arthur Prince — a creative and detail-oriented graphic designer with a keen eye for striking, well-structured designs that help brands feel distinguished.

My work focuses on clarity, balance, and intentional creativity — from social media graphics to event flyers and branding elements. Alongside design, I incorporate social media knowledge to ensure visuals align perfectly with brand and campaign goals.

Social Media Design Brand Identity Promotional Flyers T-shirt Mockups Book Covers Thumbnails Print Design Social Media Management
About me

Design that makes brands feel distinguished

Based in Nigeria, I bring over 2 years of freelance and agency experience to every project — crafting visuals that don't just look good, but perform.

Whether it's a social campaign, an event flyer, or a brand's full visual identity, I approach every brief with the same care: understand the goal, study the audience, and build something that earns attention and holds it.

What I offer

Design services tailored to your brand

From one-off graphics to full social media management, I offer end-to-end creative support so your brand always looks its best.

Start a project →
🎨
Social Media Graphics
Posts, stories, carousels, and ads designed to stop the scroll and drive engagement.
📢
Promotional Flyers
Event and campaign flyers built for both print and digital — bold, clear, and on-brand.
🏷️
Brand Identity Elements
Logos, colour palettes, and visual assets that make your brand feel instantly recognisable.
👕
Merchandise & Mockups
T-shirts, print-ready designs, and mockups that let your audience wear your brand.
📱
Social Media Management
Content strategy, scheduling, and performance-aligned visuals that grow accounts consistently.
📚
Book Covers & Thumbnails
Covers and thumbnails designed to earn clicks and communicate quality at a glance.
